spec_match.rationale: The page now feature-detects the global LanguageDetector surface, calls availability/create/detect through the shared helper when available, and labels fallback behavior when Canary reports the model unavailable.

interactive.rationale: Sample buttons and live text input update ranked candidates, confidence bars, and confidence interpretation.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The feature page and concept copy frame the API as on-device language detection with ranked confidence results and readiness/fallback handling rather than an always-ready bundled model.

edge_cases.rationale: Verified one-character input shows the short-text edge state and resets the insight text before calling detection.

references.rationale: The concept includes a dedicated references section with the ChromeStatus feature link and the Language Detector spec link.

design_system.rationale: The page continues to use the shared design variables for colors and button states, with no static-card-only interaction pattern.

summary: Verified with chrome-devtools-mcp in Chrome Canary 151 after repair: a mixed sample displayed fallback-ranked candidates and confidence guidance; a one-character input showed the explicit short-text edge state; no JavaScript errors occurred.
